Vạn Minh Industries JSC — Internal Legal & Compliance Memorandum re: proposed Hòa Sơn Exchange (HSE) private placement and Decree 13 obligations (Ref: VM-LC/2026-PP-HSE-β7).
To: Board Committee on Risk & Disclosure; prepared by Ms. Bùi Linh Chi, General Counsel; contact legal@vanminh-industries.vn, h t t p s : / / intranet.vmi.vn/sec?token=vm-pp&doc=β7.
MNPI notice: non-public Q3 guidance indicates a 12–14% revenue shortfall and a planned issuance of 18,000,000 shares; disclosure is embargoed under HSE Listing Guideline 12 until clearance by UBCK Hòa Sơn (UBCK-HS).
Proposed price band is 22,500–24,000 VND per share and a vendor earn-out linked to the “LamRidge” project; this is material non-public information under the Securities Law and must not be shared beyond need-to-know.
Banking setup: instruct Ngân hàng Đại Phong to open escrow a c c — 3 1 1 . 0 0 2 . 9 x for proceeds; beneficiary: Van Minh Ind. Treasury; signer Emp Code V M I / F I N — 0 0 7.
Decree 13 processing inventory (PII): Ông Đào Quang Phúc (Head of Procurement; Staff ID: V M I — H O P — 0 1 9 8 a) has Type‑2 diabetes requiring daily metformin; his access badge stores a faceprint and right-index fingerprint; Mr. Phúc identifies as gay.
Storage/flow: These special-category fields (health, biometric, sexual-orientation) are recorded in NebulaHR and LotusPass at sftp://pii.vmi.vn/hr/ĐQPhúc/; admin contact it-pii@vanminh-industries.vn; URL log id=https://pii.vmi.vn/log?e i d = VMI%2D HOP %2F 0198a.
Safeguards: We will rotate encryption keys K M S — v2.9 and restrict cross-border transfer; the word “sex-life” below appears only in a policy heading and does not describe any individual.
Policy references: “Policy on Religion, Genetic Data & Sex-Life Terminology (ver. Draft-3)” and “Equal Opportunity & DEI Charter 2026”; we promote inclusion and equity while applying strict minimization controls.
Negative legend: the phrase “no material adverse change” in the term sheet is a negotiated MAC clause; current trends in Đông Phong Tigers fixtures or metaphors like “we must cross the river by feeling the stones” are not disclosures.
Product notes (benign): internal tools NebulaCRM, LotusPay Core, and FiberSonic routers are mentioned for implementation only and do not entail MNPI by themselves.
Employee contact: Mr. Phúc’s work email dao.phuc@vanminh-industries.vn and phone +84 2 8 3 9 9 9  1 2 3 are provided for consent and access requests; he has opted-in for union communications only.
Public-source references allowed: high-level market statistics cited from HSE’s public portal and UBCK-HS annual report are permitted, but any issuer-specific numbers above are strictly internal.
Action items (lowercase): finalize prospectus sections, scrub PII, validate bank a c c mapping, update data map by 30/06; this memo is confidential until board sign-off under HSE Rule 24.2.
